title: AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF LUCAPON NORTH ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARRIO LUCAPON, MUNICIPALITY OF SANTA CRUZ, PROVINCE OF ZAMBALES, TO DON BRIGIDO MIRAFLOR ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 14827 / 62 OG No. 28, 4929 (July 11, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4351, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF LUCAPON NORTH ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARRIO LUCAPON, MUNICIPALITY OF SANTA CRUZ, PROVINCE OF ZAMBALES, TO DON BRIGIDO MIRAFLOR ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Lucapon North Elementary School in Barrio Lucapon, Municipality of Santa Cruz, Province of Zambales, is hereby changed to Don Brigido Mirafior Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
